name: sdd-workflow-init
description: Bootstrap plugin for sdd-workflow. Exposes /workflow-init for integrating the SDD workflow into a target project.

interface.shortDescription: Integrate the SDD workflow into any project
interface.longDescription: Single bootstrap skill that copies the SDD workflow (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, skill wrappers, plugins, playbooks, and document scaffolds) into a target project. Run once per project from a freshly cloned sdd-workflow checkout.
defaultPrompt: Integrate the SDD workflow into the project at <path>
Bootstrap SDD skills, AGENTS.md, and docs/ scaffolds in this project
